---
title: "Preface"
---

This is the analysis report for ex_P02 (Data Science and Finance).

We selected 10 A-share stocks from 7 industries and built a complete pipeline covering data acquisition, cleaning, storage, descriptive statistics, visualization, and CAPM regression.

## Key Findings

1. BYD had the highest annualized return (+30.6%), Vanke the lowest (-32.4%)
2. All return distributions exhibit fat tails, invalidating the normality assumption
3. Intra-industry correlations are significantly higher than cross-industry ones
4. CAPM Beta aligns well with cyclical vs defensive industry classification
